service.name: Anthropic Claude API
service.description_for_ai: Anthropic Claude — family of frontier AI assistants. Claude Sonnet 4.5 for best coding and reasoning, Claude Haiku 4.5 for fast cheap tasks. Supports text, vision (images/PDFs), tool use, extended thinking. 200K token context. Best for: complex analysis, coding, long document processing, multilingual tasks including Russian.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://console.anthropic.com — free tier available, no credit card required
auth.cost: Claude Haiku 4.5: $0.80/$4 per 1M tokens. Claude Sonnet 4.5: $3/$15 per 1M tokens. Claude Opus 4: $15/$75 per 1M tokens

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send messages to Claude for text generation, analysis, coding, translation. Supports multi-turn conversations, system prompts, tool use, and vision. Most capable model available for complex reasoning tasks.

messages.description: Conversation history: [{role: 'user'|'assistant', content: 'string or array of content blocks'}]

system.description: System prompt — sets Claude behavior, persona, constraints. E.g. 'You are a helpful assistant that responds in Russian.'

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens to generate. Min 1, max 8192 (Sonnet/Haiku) or 32000 (Opus). Required.

tools.description: Tool definitions: [{name, description, input_schema: {type: 'object', properties: {param: {type, description}}}}]. Claude will call tools when needed.

tool_choice.description: {type: 'auto'} lets Claude decide, {type: 'any'} forces tool use, {type: 'tool', name: 'tool_name'} forces specific tool

stream.description: Stream response tokens as Server-Sent Events for real-time display

thinking.description: {type: 'enabled', budget_tokens: 5000} — enables extended chain-of-thought reasoning before answering. Improves accuracy on complex problems.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Analyze images and PDFs with Claude. Describe content, extract text from images, answer questions about visual material. Pass images as base64 or URL.

messages.description: Content array with image and text: [{role: 'user', content: [{type: 'image', source: {type: 'base64', media_type: 'image/jpeg', data: 'BASE64_STRING'}}, {type: 'text', text: 'What is in this image?'}]}]

agent_hints.model_selection: claude-haiku-4-5: classification, routing, extraction, Q&A (fast, $0.80/1M). claude-sonnet-4-5: coding, analysis, long docs ($3/1M). claude-opus-4: hardest tasks only ($15/1M).
agent_hints.context_window: 200K tokens input — pass entire codebases, long documents, or many examples without chunking.
agent_hints.tool_use: Define tools with name, description, input_schema. Claude will call them automatically when needed and return results.
agent_hints.thinking: Extended thinking: add thinking={type:enabled, budget_tokens:8000} for math, logic, complex coding. Increases quality but also latency and cost.
agent_hints.pdf_support: Pass PDFs as {type: 'document', source: {type: 'base64', media_type: 'application/pdf', data: BASE64}} — Claude reads entire PDFs natively.
agent_hints.multimodal: Supports JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP images and PDF documents inline in messages.
